title: About
text: This is my very first blogging website, made to demonstrate how to use Quarto and GitHub.

title: SQL Is Not Easy…
text:
While I prepare for my final assignment, I am expanding my coding capabilties and learning how to handle data. I found this assignment difficult because there was a lot of data and I found it difficult to “append” it to my table…? (I think that’s what I did).
My assignment is very long because of how many participants there are… I hope the HTML works for you.
Press here to see my assignment.

title: I’m Learning How to Code
text:
I’m learning how to code with Quarto, R, and Python on VSCode. I really like the Python matplotlib plot I made; take a look!
3D Voxel/Volumetric Plot

title: Welcome To My Blog
text:
This is the first post in a Quarto blog. Welcome!

Since this post doesn’t specify an explicit image, the first image in the post will be used in the listing page of posts.

title: My First Blog Post
text: I’m starting this blog to document my learning throughout Psych 390! I’m learning new things that I didn’t know prior to this course.

title: Trying to Learn How to Post
text: Posting is hard. I want to see if I can do it right on my own…
